Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Emeril shares some of his favorite mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Join Emeril for a Mexican birthday fiesta!
Video.title: Real Mexican

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: E.J. and Meril join dad Emeril to make some of their favorite recipes.
Video.title: Cooking with Your Kids

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Learn all of Emeril's tricks of the trade: chicken-fried steaks and oysters with creamy gravy, quick and easy broccoli and cheese soup, and homemade gnocchi with marinara sauce
Video.title: Chef's Tricks of the Trade

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus-Cured Salmon, Caramelized Ruby Red Grapefruit Salad, Key Lime Cheesecake
Video.title: Citrus Rules

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Seared Beef Carpaccio with Shaved Artichokes and Truffle Oil, Salt-and-Herb-Crusted Red Snapper with Orange Salsa, Angel Food Cake with Papaya Sorbet Parfait
Video.title: The Lighter Side

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Cheesesteak Po Boy, Oyster Po Boy
Video.title: Po Boys

Video.summary: Milk Punch and Mint Julep, Duck Confit Potato Pancake with Poached Eggs, Wild and Exotic Hollandaise
Video.title: Funky Brunch

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics, including hearty chicken pot pie topped with puff-pastry crust and Emeril's super-tasty spicy meatloaf
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Image.alt: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Parmesan Pita Toast Strips; Shrimp Salad in Fan-Tailed Avocado; Cheese-Stuffed Chicken Scaloppini with Fresh Tomato Sauce; Strawberry Puff Pastry Tart
Video.title: Family Affair

Video.summary: Fried Soft Shell Crab, White Asparagus and Wild Sorrel with Ramp Dressing, Lemon-Scented Boar Chops with Chanterelle and Fava Bean Ragout, Wild Strawberries and Cream
Video.title: Wild Things

Video.summary: Tomato and Bean Salsa, Seafood Ceviche Tacos, Taco Salad with Roasted Poblano Buttermilk Dressing, Triple Chocolate Brownies with Cinnamon Cream Cheese Icing
Video.title: A Southwestern Picnic

Video.summary: Porcini Salad, Apricot-Glazed Roast Duck with Caramelized Apples, Garlic and Herb Roasted Potatoes, Pear and Stilton Souffle with Pear Compote
Video.title: Hearty Harvests

Video.summary: Emeril's best dips and chips: hot shrimp dip served with French bread croustades, French onion dip, and roasted red pepper hummus
Video.title: Dips and Chips

Video.summary: Homemade Tarragon Mustard; Remoulade Sauce; Mustard-Crusted Rack of Lamb; Fresh Fig Chutney
Video.title: Mustard

Video.summary: Country Ham with Redeye Gravy and Buttermilk Biscuits; Country Ham and Apple Slaw with Baby Swiss and Bourbon Mustard; Frozen Mint Julep
Video.title: Country Ham Show
